/**
 * Filters Slice
 * =============
 * Manages product filtering state for category selection and search functionality.
 * The Home page uses these values to filter the displayed product list.
 */import{createSlice}from'@reduxjs/toolkit';const filtersSlice=createSlice({name:'filters',initialState:{selectedCategory:'all',searchQuery:''},reducers:{// Set the active product category filter
setCategory:(state,action)=>{state.selectedCategory=action.payload;},// Update the search query for product filtering
setSearchQuery:(state,action)=>{state.searchQuery=action.payload;},// Reset all filters to their default values
clearFilters:state=>{state.selectedCategory='all';state.searchQuery='';}}});export const{setCategory,setSearchQuery,clearFilters}=filtersSlice.actions;export default filtersSlice.reducer;
